feed.title: AO3 - Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: The Ties That Bind
entry.summary:
Author: Rnl1993

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,607Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 33

Summary: Dean and Sam grew up stopping by the Stilinski's house throughout the years. When Stiles ends up in the hospital due to a supernatural accident, Papa Stilinski decides to send Stiles with Dean for the summer to get properly trained. After all, he knows Stiles won't stop helping his friends and the best way to prepare him is to be trained by someone whose life is dedicated to dealing with the supernatural.ORThe one where the Winchesters grow up in a drastically different way and are pretty much adopted by the Stilinski's. The Hale's get a happy life rewrite and everything canon is pretty much changed to suit my needs. Originally called 'Echoes in our Lives'

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: Beacon of Gotham
entry.summary:
Author: IndridxCold

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,626Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 39

Summary: Stiles leaves Beacon Hills with one mind: LEAVE BEHIND ALL THE WEREWOLF DRAMA and especially his beloved Derek Hale. Unfortunately, the universe has a pretty funny sense of humor, because he ends up in Gotham City, home to masked lunatics, crime-ridden alleys, and a caped crusader that reigns the night. Stiles keeps telling himself, he's passing through... except Gotham has a way of pulling people in. Between getting tangled up with the brooding Dark Knight to crossing paths with the mysterious but also dashing billionaire playboy, Bruce Wayne, Stiles somehow finds himself right in the middle of something bigger than Gotham's usual chaos. Because while everyone's busy watching the streets, something else is moving in the shadows and connecting people who should have nothing to do with each other... especially Stiles.

entry.title: The Mage's Home
entry.summary:
Author: DaoOfGay

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,481Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 46

Summary: After a severe crash out and mental breakdown that resulted in him opening his soul and awakening it to his true power, Stiles is kicked out of Scott's pack by said Alpha. Years later, a much more mature and powerful Stiles receives an S.O.S message from a friend, and this time, he won't fail. Or; Stiles leaves Beacon Hills, makes his own pack, gets better, and returns to kick ass.

entry.title: The nogitsune
entry.summary:
Author: UrNewtmas_ObsessedGirl

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,850Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 29

Summary: When Stiles goes missing for three weeks and suddenly shows up at the loft, there's something off. His scent. Everything. And when his eyes glow gold instead of his usual brown, Derek knows something is horribly wrong. I suck at summary's.Tags will be updated as the story gets updated.

entry.title: Save Point
entry.summary:
Author: TheThirdChild

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 95,666Chapters: 26/26Kudos: 292

Summary: Stiles is determined to give Derek the perfect anniversary gift—the kind that proves he truly sees him. That somehow resulted in time travel and a surprise encounter with the Hale Pack pre-everything. Now he has to gather insight, avoid suspicion, and absolutely not rewrite history. Derek wanted something meaningful, but this might be too meaningful. Perfect gift status: pending.

entry.title: A Flower Made Of Iron
entry.summary:
Author: XOLissy

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,838,368Chapters: 50/?Kudos: 69

Summary: Eden Parker has learned how to survive by staying soft in a world that punishes it. Adopted young, raised in the quiet fractures of Mystic Falls, and carrying truths no one else can see, Eden moves through life balancing grief, loyalty, and a dangerous kind of hope. He loves deeply. He trusts carefully. And he has no idea how many forces—human and otherwise—are already watching him. When new friendships form, old wounds reopen, and the supernatural begins to bleed into the ordinary, Eden finds himself at the center of something far larger than a high-school existence should allow. Monsters lurk in forests and shadows. Love arrives when it shouldn’t. Protection becomes complicated. And the past—buried, sealed, and forgotten—refuses to stay quiet. Some bonds are chosen. Some are fated. And some are forged in pain, blood, and devotion. Disclaimer: I do not own the Vampire Diaries, Supernatural, Teen Wolf, Smallville, or The Originals. I do not own any of the characters besides Eden Parker and Ben Monroe. All rights reserved to the writers.

entry.summary:
Author: Kass_Writes

entry.title: Balls-Deep & Busted
entry.summary:
Author: Nightowl_22

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,469Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 56

Summary: In the middle of a heated, shamelessly explicit afternoon romp, Derek rides Stiles with reckless abandon—moaning loud enough to wake the neighbors—until Scott bursts through the door without knocking. Chaos ensues as Stiles scrambles to shield his boyfriend, Scott spins away in horror, and Derek refuses to let the interruption kill the mood, clenching and grinding shamelessly while Scott rants in the background. Or the one where Scott walks in on his best friend balls-deep in Derek Hale and gets the trauma of a lifetime, only for the couple to pick right back up the second the door slams shut—because apparently nothing kills the mood like a best friend's horrified screech when his timing is tragically impeccable.

entry.title: Hiraeth
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 24,689Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 34

Summary: The Nemeton got lost so Derek and Stiles went to Brazil to look for the mythical being Saci-Pererê that could help them out to locate it. Unknown to them, the journey will not only lead to solve the mystery of the Nemeton's disapperance, but it will also be the key to self-discovery and hopefully love and happy endings. Unfortunately, nothing good ever comes without a price.

entry.title: A Roomie In Need
entry.summary:
Author: Nightowl_22

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,745Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 56

Summary: Stiles comes home expecting an empty apartment, only to find his brooding roommate Derek Hale drowning his sorrows in beer after being stood up on a date. The guy was a controlling liar anyway, but Derek's real frustration? He was genuinely looking forward to finally getting laid after too long without it—he doesn't do hookups with strangers and needs some connection first. When Stiles casually suggests Derek doesn't have to look far for willing company (and reveals he's bisexual), Derek takes the hint fast. Or the one where Stiles makes an offer he never expected Derek to take—turning a disappointing night into the hottest, most honest hookup of their lives, and two idiots finally admitting how badly they've wanted each other all along.

entry.title: the gift
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,693Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 6

Summary: “Yeah, just like that, angel. There you go,” Stiles tells him softly, stroking over his bare stomach as he reaches down to free Derek's cock from his panties. “So hard for me, Derek. You feel so good, don’t you, baby?”Derek nods again, a small whine curling from the back of his throat. It does feel good. It feels fucking euphoric to be handled by Stiles. Derek is being so good for him, giving Daddy everything he asks for, sitting fat and pretty in his collar and silk panties, full to the brim of shit and food that will inevitably become shit—the gift that keeps on giving.He’s been well tended to, played with, and loved. It’s all he could ever ask for. Of course he feels good.

entry.title: dead air
entry.summary:
Author: sparassiss

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,321Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 7

Summary: “Then what, what can I do?” Stiles pleads in return, desperate to do something, anything so he doesn’t just have to stand by and watch Derek suffer.Derek looks like he’s fighting with himself again, eyes wide and flashing between hazel and red, scanning the room unseeingly. The pain he’s in is something he can’t escape; he just has to wait it out, but fuck, it hurts. But he’s not allowed to talk about it, that’ll just make it more real, and he’ll be complaining, and Stiles has heard him complain about it far too much by now, it must be getting old.  _Or, Derek refuses to speak any more of the pain he’s in, thinking it will curse him more and make him worse, that he’s brought this on himself. Stiles fills in the gaps.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski
  • Derek Hale

entry.title: the spaces in between
entry.summary:
Author: Melpomene (Aconitehart)

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,503Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 28

Summary: The story goes like this. Long ago, a witch desired a local hedge knight and struck up a romance with him. She desired him far more than he desired her, and when his interest waned, the witch cursed him to sleep eternal. Trapped between life and death, the knight lingers, unable to wake up or communicate. But the witch's cruelty couldn't be sated by that alone. She laid a second curse upon the knight: his body would never be able to refuse another lover. He would stay hard and aching, his body willing to please, until the end of time. To protect their local knight, the villagers built a tower in the middle of the woods and placed their own magic upon it. There he was sealed away, passing into local legend to most of the population. Only a select few know the truth and the name of the knight.

  • Rape/Non-Con
  • Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski
  • Stiles Stilinski
  • Derek Hale
  • Alternate Universe - Modern with Magic
  • Somnophilia
  • Knotting
  • Come Inflation
  • Xenophilia
  • sleeping beauty inspired

entry.title: Doodles
entry.summary:
Author: Definitively_Different_Drivel

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,652Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 77

Summary: Screaming fabric stretched across Derek's skin. Damn though, those were pecs of truth, pinched and perky and perfectly poised beneath altogether too thin fabric. He'd need to take it up with Shakira, because yeah her hips didn't lie but clearly they weren't bastions of veracity like Derek's chest, and— shit. Derek's eyebrows grew stormier, like a pair of little thunderclouds, ready to rain on Stiles' tight-shirt parade, only without water, because life wasn't fair, demonstrated by the fact that his thoughts were now occupied by visions of Derek's t-shirt, soaked, wet, and wrapped like latex as the sight of tan skin seeped through and— Shit. What was he thinking about again? "You remember what happened last time you got me into a shirt this tight, don't you?"In which Stiles shrinks Derek's clothes and gets caught. Derek gets some very creative revenge. It ends, of course, in smut.

  • Underage Sex
  • Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski
  • Derek Hale
  • Stiles Stilinski
  • Crack Treated Seriously
  • sass and banter
